label: 1172_islamic finance_akhtar aziz_zeti akhtar_zeti
label_human: Malaysian central bank governor on islamic finance
description: Dr Zeti Akhtar Aziz, Governor of Bank Malaysia, discussed the role and future of Islamic finance in challenging economic environments. She highlighted its transition from legal compliance to a source of economic value, emphasizing regulatory frameworks and governance.
